key.name: theme-variant
key.description: The theme variant to use: simple or pro

key.name: first-boot-complete
key.description: Whether the first boot wizard has been completed

key.name: show-welcome-on-login
key.description: Show the welcome dialog on each login

key.name: dock-position
key.description: Position of the dock: left, right, or bottom

key.name: ai-assistant-enabled
key.description: Whether the AI assistant is enabled

key.name: privacy-telemetry
key.description: Allow system telemetry for crash reports
